positive: A highly detailed, central composition featuring stylized woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer) nestled within massive, blooming floral patterns and intricate botanical vines. The style must be a blend of modern graphic illustration, clean vector art, and neo-vintage whimsy. Use a vibrant, limited color palette of forest green, deep sapphire blue, terracotta orange, and cream accents. The design must maintain strong silhouettes and high contrast, resembling a sophisticated screen-printed textile pattern suitable for apparel. Composition must be fully contained and centered, with no distracting background elements or negative space. Overhead studio lighting, perfect crisp edges, 8k digital illustration.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifact, text, watermark, signature, messy background, grainy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, monochrome, gradient, copyright
